title: Develop and implement a plant health management strategy
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop and implement a plant health management strategy demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop a plant health management program

pcs.text: Identify plant health issues from published data, historical records and industry consultation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify plant health issues from published data, historical records and industry consultation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify plant health issues from published data, historical records and industry consultation.

pcs.text: Define management issues relative to desired quality, quantity and productivity requirements according to workplace marketing and production plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define management issues relative to desired quality, quantity and productivity requirements according to workplace marketing and production plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define management issues relative to desired quality, quantity and productivity requirements according to workplace marketing and production plans.

pcs.text: Develop and document a program that defines workplace guidelines and specific responsibilities of operational elements to achieve required outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and document a program that defines workplace guidelines and specific responsibilities of operational elements to achieve required outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and document a program that defines workplace guidelines and specific responsibilities of operational elements to achieve required outcomes.

pcs.text: Establish systems to monitor business goals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish systems to monitor business goals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish systems to monitor business goals.

pcs.text: Seek professional assistance where appropriate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek professional assistance where appropriate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek professional assistance where appropriate.

pcs.text: Consider and document the environmental implications of chemical use, alternative methods and non-chemical preventative methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider and document the environmental implications of chemical use, alternative methods and non-chemical preventative methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider and document the environmental implications of chemical use, alternative methods and non-chemical preventative methods.

pcs.text: Assess and determine potential key information for input to planning decisions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and determine potential key information for input to planning decisions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and determine potential key information for input to planning decisions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Develop a plant health management program

elements.title: Determine plant health strategy

pcs.text: Analyse gathered information and determine plant health management approaches
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse gathered information and determine plant health management approaches?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse gathered information and determine plant health management approaches.

pcs.text: Consider plant health management approaches and their impacts
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider plant health management approaches and their impacts?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider plant health management approaches and their impacts.

pcs.text: Determine strategies for plant health management to integrate the most suitable methods with the proposed plants and existing soil types
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine strategies for plant health management to integrate the most suitable methods with the proposed plants and existing soil types?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine strategies for plant health management to integrate the most suitable methods with the proposed plants and existing soil types.

pcs.text: Establish environmental controls according to environmental and biosecurity legislation and regulations, and include in the plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish environmental controls according to environmental and biosecurity legislation and regulations, and include in the plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish environmental controls according to environmental and biosecurity legislation and regulations, and include in the plan.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and incorporate suitable controls into the plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and incorporate suitable controls into the plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and incorporate suitable controls into the plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine plant health strategy

elements.title: Provide input to other planning processes

pcs.text: Provide plant health management strategy information for consideration and input to other workplace planning processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide plant health management strategy information for consideration and input to other workplace planning processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide plant health management strategy information for consideration and input to other workplace planning processes.

pcs.text: Collect and use information from other workplace planning processes to inform the plant health management planning process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and use information from other workplace planning processes to inform the plant health management planning process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and use information from other workplace planning processes to inform the plant health management planning process.

pcs.text: Communicate information about the range of planning processes according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate information about the range of planning processes according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate information about the range of planning processes according to workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Provide input to other planning processes

elements.title: Determine scheduling and key responsibilities

pcs.text: Determine scheduling for plant health management, taking into consideration the range of seasonal, geographic and resourcing factors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine scheduling for plant health management, taking into consideration the range of seasonal, geographic and resourcing factors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine scheduling for plant health management, taking into consideration the range of seasonal, geographic and resourcing factors.

pcs.text: Determine key responsibilities for specific implementation processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine key responsibilities for specific implementation processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine key responsibilities for specific implementation processes.

pcs.text: Determine record-keeping requirements and establish procedures to ensure compliance with relevant regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine record-keeping requirements and establish procedures to ensure compliance with relevant regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine record-keeping requirements and establish procedures to ensure compliance with relevant regulations.

pcs.text: Document strategic plant health management plan, including scheduling and key responsibilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document strategic plant health management plan, including scheduling and key responsibilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document strategic plant health management plan, including scheduling and key responsibilities.

pcs.text: Confirm the plan includes the type, format, frequency and detail of any reporting required by both managers and operators
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm the plan includes the type, format, frequency and detail of any reporting required by both managers and operators?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm the plan includes the type, format, frequency and detail of any reporting required by both managers and operators.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Determine scheduling and key responsibilities

elements.title: Monitor and adjust plant health management strategy

pcs.text: Evaluate the effectiveness of the plant health management strategy at key points, and make adjustments as necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate the effectiveness of the plant health management strategy at key points, and make adjustments as necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate the effectiveness of the plant health management strategy at key points, and make adjustments as necessary.

pcs.text: Identify and monitor environmental impacts and workplace health and safety hazards relating to plant health management, and assess and manage risks throughout the implementation process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and monitor environmental impacts and workplace health and safety hazards relating to plant health management, and assess and manage risks throughout the implementation process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and monitor environmental impacts and workplace health and safety hazards relating to plant health management, and assess and manage risks throughout the implementation process.

pcs.text: Make modifications to the plan according to environmental, workplace health and safety, resourcing, or effectiveness reasons
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make modifications to the plan according to environmental, workplace health and safety, resourcing, or effectiveness reasons?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make modifications to the plan according to environmental, workplace health and safety, resourcing, or effectiveness reasons.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Monitor and adjust plant health management strategy

elements.title: Evaluate plant health management strategy and record results

pcs.text: Analyse data, observations and documentation from the implementation of the plant health management strategy against the plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse data, observations and documentation from the implementation of the plant health management strategy against the plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse data, observations and documentation from the implementation of the plant health management strategy against the plan.

pcs.text: Prepare recommendations for future strategies based on the analysis of the data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare recommendations for future strategies based on the analysis of the data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare recommendations for future strategies based on the analysis of the data.

pcs.text: Prepare a report that documents the implementation of the plant health management strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare a report that documents the implementation of the plant health management strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a report that documents the implementation of the plant health management strategy.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Evaluate plant health management strategy and record results
